title: II-VI (IIVI) Surges 5.6%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
text: II-VI (IIVI) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions could translate into further price increase in the near term.

title: Dodge & Cox Ups Its Bet on II-VI
text: Investment firm Dodge & Cox disclosed last week it upped its stake in II-VI Inc. ( IIVI , Financial) by 63.42%.

title: II-VI Is A Powerful Choice In Multiple Secular Growth Trends
text: II-VI has built a remarkably robust moat and is massively investing in strong secular growth trends. The street consensus anticipates 16.11% FCF and 13.34% EBIT CAGR over the next 5 years.
